overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a space exploration game showing the player floating in zero gravity near an industrial cargo spaceship. A massive ringed gas giant dominates the background while the camera slowly pans to reveal a large modular space station structure. The scene features realistic space lighting with the player's handheld mining tool visible in the foreground.

entered.detail: industrial vessel with orange thruster pods and green cargo containers
futuristic cutting tool with metallic finish held in first-person view
massive planet with prominent icy rings illuminated by distant starlight

segments.scene_description: The player floats through open space approaching a large industrial cargo ship. As the camera drifts forward, a massive ringed gas giant rises into view from below, dominating the background with its illuminated rings while the player's mining tool remains visible in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep space observation point near cargo vessel

events.description: handheld mining tool activates with visible blue energy emission
camera stabilizes position relative to the drifting spaceship

agents.ego_description: activating the mining tool while maintaining position in zero gravity near the vessel

segments.scene_description: The player maintains position in zero gravity while manipulating the handheld mining tool, which emits a brief pulse of blue light. The cargo ship drifts slowly to the left as the player observes the vessel against the backdrop of the ringed planet.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep space with modular orbital station

events.description: camera pans right revealing large modular space station structure
ringed planet exits frame as view focuses on station

agents.ego_description: turning toward and observing the massive space station structure while drifting

entered.detail: large industrial orbital platform with multiple connected modules and external scaffolding

segments.scene_description: The player turns right to reveal a massive modular space station with intricate scaffolding and connected modules. As the camera pans, the ringed planet moves out of view while the station grows larger in the frame, dominating the right side of the scene as the player continues to drift in zero gravity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drift through open space that transitions from a view of a ringed gas giant to the discovery of a massive modular space station. It begins with the camera floating toward a large industrial cargo ship as a colossal ringed planet rises from below to dominate the background, with a handheld mining tool visible in the foreground. As the player maintains their position in zero gravity, the mining tool emits a brief pulse of blue light while the cargo ship slowly drifts to the left. The scene then shifts as the camera pans right, causing the ringed planet to slide out of view. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal an intricate space station composed of scaffolding and connected modules that grows to dominate the frame.
